Mr Dursley is a catholic. The dog chased by the boy escaped. The window was broken. The teacher showed the map to the students. The chef cooked a meal for the guests. The tree was cut by the farmer. Emily is a wolf. These links present the many viewpoints that existed. John is not defeated?
